creator: pkk@spth.de
text:
I reported it here, since, when I reported it, I had not able to reproduce the issue on some other systems I tried (except for one testcase failed on amd64 when using clang 6), so it looked specific to FreeBSD on aarch64 to me.

I have since been able to reproduce the issue on Debian/GNU Linux on aarch64 (Raspi 4) using clang 14.
